info.title: Academic Platform ERP API
info.description: NestJS backend for ERP authentication, onboarding, tenant branding, and school operations.

primaryColor.description: Primary color as a hex string, e.g. #8a5a44

accentColor.description: Accent color as a hex string, e.g. #d59f6a

sidebarColor.description: Sidebar color as a hex string, e.g. #32241c

fontBody.description: Body font family, e.g. Libre Baskerville

fontMono.description: Monospace font family, e.g. IBM Plex Mono
